name: Shizuoka Gas Co., Ltd.
summary: Shizuoka Gas Co., Ltd. produces, supplies, and sells city gas in Japan. The company also sells gas appliances; and undertakes contracts for gas related construction works. As of December 31, 2019, it served approximately 320,390 customers through a gas pipeline network of 4,469 km. The company was founded in 1910 and is headquartered in Shizuoka, Japan.
